error_signature: dynamic expressions for binary file paths resolving to empty strings
title: FFmpeg Execute Command node fails due to empty binary path expressions
symptom: The Execute Command node fails to resolve binary file paths, resulting in empty strings for input variables. This leads to FFmpeg commands not executing as expected.
applies_when: Dynamic expressions for binary file paths
not_this_if: Binary file paths are correctly resolved and not empty
root_cause: The Execute Command node requires valid file paths that exist on disk. When using binary data, the paths may not be correctly referenced, leading to empty strings in the command execution.
fix_steps: Use the Read/Write Files from Disk node to write the binary files to a temporary location on disk.
Pass the valid file paths from the disk to the Execute Command node for FFmpeg commands.
agent_instruction: Write binary files to disk using the Read/Write Files from Disk node before executing FFmpeg commands.
safety_notes: Remember to clean up temporary files after processing.
